title: Cobblemon Trainer Structures
description: Adds custom cobblemon structures with trainers.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c68fe5b938c6b9963084702cbcaed70643d20b1.png)



Trainer Structures is a Cobblemon addon that adds new structures to the world, each with trainers to battle and rewards to earn.

Some of the many structures added by this mod include:

**Pokemon Stadium:**

Pokemon Stadiums are massive structures which contain challenging battles against iconic trainers. Trainers in these stadiums keep their original teams, but with modernized movesets, held items, and fully EV-trained Pokemon. Be prepared!


![Stadium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e81491cb38aabb0007722f2cb6db3af3357b9515_0.webp)

![Cynthia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fe5a469236fb218da2f6dd1beae8a06706d9565_0.webp)

![Lance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91a5378a8a8c9227fc98df401529c8247134af17_0.webp)

![N-Zoroark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79e8c02d182828082a4ae4733c565b5741d028bc_0.webp)

![Steven](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de0a412bf59c3e4afa1e9edb5792e79928b6b2b1_0.webp)

Since Pokemon Stadiums are massive, they’re very rare. It’s recommended to use **Explorer's Compass** alongside this mod.

**Some Other Structures:**

_The Sun Temple_

![Sun Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02a57ce2c6e73def3db1bc0196126d1e2d5f5ef3_0.webp)

_The Storm Temple_

![Storm Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/860b0183faddb5ab86fe01992d8ab97d869e784e.png)


_The Sand Temple_
![Sand Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50312240de70e2a8612670c631b2b8000d475184.png)


_Note: This mod requires Cobblemon and its dependencies to run._
